creator: dillon@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Just prior to the 3.3 release getnewbuf() was patched to avoid this particular 
panic.  The patch is about as good as we can get short of rewriting  
getnewbuf() in the 3.x releases.  getnewbuf() *has* been completely rewritten 
in the 4.x development kernels (i.e. -current) and does not have this problem 
at all.
